title: picea × fennica
intro: Picea × fennica, also known as Colorado Blue Spruce, is a hybrid plant species derived from the crossing of Picea pungens and Picea glauca. The essential oil extracted from its needles has been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable component in traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with Picea × fennica include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Picea × fennica can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and skin irritations.
